title: viscum angustifolium
intro: Viscum angustifolium, also known as mistletoe, is a semi-parasitic plant that grows on various tree species, particularly in North America. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Viscum angustifolium include reducing stress, boosting the immune system, and potentially fighting cancer. Herbal preparations of mistletoe, such as extracts and infusions, are often used in complementary medicine to promote overall well-being and to support the treatment of various health conditions.
